ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How do I solve X?'})-[r1:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {is_accepted: true}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'programming'}),
    p3 = (a)-[r3:PROVIDED]->(u:User {display_name: 'Neo4jExpert'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the programming tag most commonly influence the accepted answers to questions like "How do I solve X?" and who frequently provides them?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag)<-[:TAGGED]-(otherQ:Question)
WHERE otherQ.body_markdown CONTAINS 'How do I solve X?'
WITH t, count(otherQ) AS influence, collect(DISTINCT otherQ.uuid) AS users
ORDER BY influence DESC
RETURN t.name AS programmingTag, influence, users
